0 a  Results of the cell-by-cell simulation of the woody material transportation and deposition volumes. The  red dots  show the centre of gravity of the deposited model wood logs

after_value:

0 a Results of the cell-by-cell simulation of the woody material transportation and deposition volumes. The red colours show the volume of deposited driftwood, the blue colours show the volume of passing driftwood at each cell. The maximum values are calculated at the outflow cell. b Results of the object-oriented simulation of the deposition of woody material.
